bySigningConfirm: By signing, I confirm I am the parent/legal guardian.

iGivePermission: I give permission for transportation & participation

payment.title: Payment
payment.subtitle: Complete payment for {{studentName}} to participate in {{tripTitle}}

noStudentLeftOut: No student is ever left out.
noStudentLeftOutDesc: If the cost is a hardship, choose an option below. The TripSlip Field Trip Fund ensures every student can participate regardless of ability to pay.
learnAboutFund: Learn about the TripSlip Field Trip Fund →
payPartial: I can pay part of it
payPartialDesc: Pay what you can — the Fund covers the rest
needAssistanceDesc: Your student is still fully included — no questions asked
fullCostIs: Full cost is ${{amount}} — pay any amount.
thankYouFund: Thank you! 100% goes to the Fund.
aboutFund: About the TripSlip Field Trip Fund
spotConfirmed: Your student's spot is confirmed. No student is ever excluded.
fundCoversRest: The TripSlip Field Trip Fund covers the rest.
freeAccountNoReEntry: Free account = no re-entry next time.
iAgreeToSchool: I have read and agree to the {{school}} supplemental permission.
medicalFormRequiredDesc: This trip requires a medical form to be completed. Please ensure all medical information is provided before the trip date.
awaitingSignaturePayment: This permission slip is awaiting your signature and payment.
allSetConfirmed: All set! Your student is confirmed for the field trip.
signatureError: Failed to save signature. Please try again.
paymentError: There was an error processing your payment. Please try again.
